settings.title: Add 2 items to your cart and get the cheaper one for free!
Free shipping & Free package gifts
settings.text:
We are committed to providing quick and efficient delivery services to all our valued customers.

Each solariijewelry product must be manually inspected and packaged before shipping.

Delivery Time= Processing Time + Shipping Time

Processing Time

Processing time differs from product to product. Some popular styles can be shipped out within 48 hours, while other orders may take 5-7 business days. Please note that this does not include holidays and weekends.

Shipping Time

During the holidays, the shipping time may be longer than usual. Please check your tracking information for specific delivery time.

Our standard shipping duration ranges from 7-15 business days, and at this time, we are only able to provide shipping services within the United States. We are constantly working on expanding our delivery capabilities to serve you better.

Free shipping

We provide free shipping on all orders! No hidden costs, just choose what you love, and we'll handle the rest. Enjoy a transparent, hassle-free shopping experience.

※Please note that orders being shipped to certain remote areas may incur additional shipping charges, due to the increased costs associated with these deliveries.

Packaging

We offer luxurious, beautifully designed gift boxes at no additional cost! The perfect packaging for all your gifting needs.

settings.title: Environmental Sustainability&Recycled Materials
settings.text:
At Solarii Jewelry, Every piece is handcrafted with 100% recycled solid sterling silver, reducing CO2 emissions by over 60%.

All of our moissanite stones are meticulously crafted in advanced laboratories. This process significantly reduces the consumption of natural resources and eliminates the environmental degradation associated with traditional mining. Lab-created moissanite offers the same brilliance, hardness, and beauty as natural diamonds, without the need to deplete Earth's precious resources, thus achieving true sustainability.

In our sourcing process, we adhere to the highest ethical standards. We ensure that every moissanite stone is produced without any form of exploitation, forced labor, or unfair treatment. We collaborate with partners who share our values, ensuring that every step of our supply chain is transparent, fair, and humane.

settings.title: Lead and Cadmium Release: PASS
settings.text: Indicates our commitment to safety and quality. Our products undergo rigorous testing to ensure no harmful trace metals are released, providing not only utility but health assurance for our consumers.

settings.title: Nickel Release: PASS
settings.text: Signifies our dedication to consumer safety. This means our products comply with stringent nickel release regulations to prevent potential allergic reactions, ensuring our commitment to health as well as functionality.

settings.title: What You Recieve
settings.text:
Receiving your bespoke piece from SolariiJewelry is an incomparable experience. Within your box from us you will receive:

· Shopping Bag
· Jewelry Box
· Polishing Cloth
· Care Guide
· Return&Exchange Card
· Gemstone Certification(Moissanite Products)
· Free Silver Jewelry
· Free Natural Crystal(2-3cm)

settings.title: Mystery Box
settings.text:
